interface.name: ext_session_lock_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface is used to request that the session be locked.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the session lock manager. Existing locks continue.

request.name: lock
request.description: Attempt to lock the session. The compositor sends the locked event on success, or finished on failure.

interface.name: ext_session_lock_v1

description.summary: manage lock state and lock surfaces

interface.description: On creation the compositor attempts to lock the session. The client must create lock surfaces for all outputs and render to them before the compositor sends the locked event.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the session lock. Only usable after finished event.

request.name: get_lock_surface

description.summary: create a lock surface for an output

request.description: Create a lock surface for the given output. The surface must be committed with a buffer before the locked event is sent.

request.name: unlock_and_destroy
request.description: Unlock the session. Only valid after locked event.

event.name: locked
event.description: The session is now locked. The compositor will not show other surfaces until unlock_and_destroy is called.

event.name: finished

description.summary: the session lock object should be destroyed

event.description: The lock has been destroyed or the session lock failed. The client should destroy this object.

interface.name: ext_session_lock_surface_v1

description.summary: a lock surface for a given output

interface.description: A surface displayed on an output while the session is locked.

request.name: ack_configure
request.description: Acknowledge the configure event. Must be acked before commit.

event.name: configure
event.description: Compositor suggests a new size for the surface.
